name: The Quiet Majority
specialty: A group of skilled and silent infiltrators, specializing in covert operations and sabotage, earning their reputation through unmatched stealth and precision.

members.name: Eira Blackhart
members.note: Her eyes are always hidden behind a veil, a constant reminder of her past as a high-ranking member of the Iron Fang Consortium before defecting to the Wardens.

members.name: Thorne Shadowstep
members.note: His keen senses and uncanny ability to navigate the rift-riddled Undercity make him an invaluable asset to the group.

members.name: Gideon Stonebreaker
members.note: His knowledge of ancient arcane texts and unwavering loyalty to the Wardens make him the team's resident magic expert.

members.name: Cinder Ashwhisper
members.note: Her agility and combat prowess are matched only by her fiery spirit, making her a formidable force in the field.

visual: Clad in black ash-stained leather armor, they move with a silent grace, their faces obscured by hoods and masks. A silver wolf emblem, symbolizing their Wardens of Ash allegiance, is etched on each of their weapons.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity, warning that they are not to be underestimated. They operate with a silent efficiency that leaves few witnesses and even fewer clues.
